content.stem: Look at the growing pattern. Small box, medium box, large box. What comes next?
content.explanation: The boxes are growing bigger each time. After large, the next size up would be extra large to continue the growing pattern.

distractor_rationale.reasoning: Child thinks the pattern cycles back to the beginning instead of continuing to grow
Child thinks the pattern goes back one step instead of forward
Child repeats the last element instead of continuing the progression
